## ERT1.1. Effective use of reserved or segregated local airspace (PI#9) {#ert1.1.-effective-use-of-reserved-or-segregated-local-airspace-pi9 .Heading-2-ER}

CROATIA reported that they had no data.

After consulting NM, Croatia reported a ratio of **95%.**

*[Comment:]{.underline}*

*This number (percentage) has been communicated by NM upon request and published on the SES Performance Portal*

*The data regarding total number of hours allocated & notified to NM and total number of hours used have not been delivered by NM nor are available on the SES Performance Portal. This cannot be monitored at local level. The same applies to data per ACC.*
